characters.name: Characters
characters.description: Five of the main characters of season 1 The characters of theHey DudeTV series are the fictional people appearing in theepisodesof the show. The main characters of the show are the ranch owner, his son, the female ranch hand, and the six teenage summer employees. The main characters of eachseasonas well as theregular cast membersportraying them are indicated in the opening credits in the intro of eachepisode. There are seven main characters in seasons 1 and 2 and nine in seasons 3 to 5. However, not all the main characters credited in a season haveappearancesin each episode of the season. characters.name: Appearances
characters.description: Six main characters (the six summer employees) appearing together in a season 5 episode Themain charactersof eachseasonof theHey DudeTV series are credited in the intro of all theepisodesof the corresponding season. However, they need not appear in each episode of a season in which they are credited. There are seven main characters in seasons 1 and 2 and nine in seasons 3 to 5. The following tables show the appearances of the main characters in the individual episodes of each season as well as their total appearances througout the series.

characters.name: Appearances
